description_long: This is a large, L-shaped desk made primarily of dark wood or wood laminate, featuring a spacious work surface with a curved cutout for ergonomic seating. The desk includes a set of four drawers on the left side, each with a metallic handle, and a lower shelf on the right for additional storage or a computer tower. Above the main work surface, there is an integrated hutch with two open shelves on the right and a double-door cabinet on the left, providing ample storage for books, files, or office supplies. The cabinet doors are light-colored, contrasting with the darker wood finish of the rest of the desk. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for professional or home office environments. The construction appears sturdy, with thick panels and a smooth, matte finish.
description: A large, L-shaped dark wood desk with drawers, a hutch featuring open shelves and a double-door cabinet, and a curved work surface. The design is modern and functional, ideal for office or home use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double-door cabinet, open shelves, and the main workspace with the drawers and lower shelf visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the panels and the depth of the hutch and work surface.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the L-shaped layout, curved cutout, and arrangement of drawers, cabinet, and shelves.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the continuous wood grain and the lower shelf beneath the desk surface.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the curved cutout and drawers, with the hutch and cabinet positioned at the back and above the main work surface.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or office desk for multitasking and storage
